errors.authExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.businessRule: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.validation: Some fields need attention. Please review them and retry.
errors.notFound: The requested record no longer exists.
errors.offline: You appear to be offline. Reconnect and try again.

loginPage.signInHint: Use email verification code, password, or Google to access your ledgers.
loginPage.verificationCodeDevHint: Local dev tip: if SMTP is not configured, check backend logs for [DEV MAIL] code.
loginPage.sendCodeFailed: Unable to send a verification code right now.
loginPage.verifyCodeFailed: Unable to verify your code right now.
loginPage.passwordAuthFailed: Unable to complete password sign-in right now.

googleCallback.waiting: Please wait while we finish authentication.
googleCallback.missingExchangeCode: Google login failed: missing exchange code.
googleCallback.failedRetry: Google login failed. Please try again.
googleCallback.oauthCodeInvalidOrExpired: The Google authorization code has expired or was already used. Please return to login and try Google sign-in again.
googleCallback.googleOauthNotConfigured: Google OAuth is not configured correctly. Check the local client ID, secret, and callback URL.
googleCallback.googleTokenExchangeFailed: The Google callback URL does not match or the token exchange failed. Check the redirect URI in Google Console.
googleCallback.oauthStateInvalidOrExpired: This Google login session has expired. Please return to login and start again.
googleCallback.oauthCallbackInvalid: The Google login callback is missing required parameters. Please start again.
googleCallback.googleProfileFetchFailed: Google authorization succeeded, but account profile lookup failed. Confirm the Google account can return email profile data.
googleCallback.googleEmailMissing: The Google account did not return a usable email address, so login cannot finish.
googleCallback.defaultFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Financial Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Track cashflow in real time and keep your books healthy with clear next steps.
dashboard.trendHint: Tap or hover bars to inspect monthly income and expense totals.
dashboard.noSelectedMonthTransactions: No transactions in the selected month.

actionCenter.title: Action Center
actionCenter.description: Review transactions that need cleanup before you rely on reports.
actionCenter.nextStepReview: Clean up the review queue before reading month-end reports.
actionCenter.nextStepClear: Your recent transactions look ready for reporting.

offline.message: You are offline. Cached data is being shown.

topBar.noCriticalAlerts: No critical alerts right now. Your ledger services are running normally.
topBar.searchTip: Tip: Use the search box to jump to transactions by ID, category, or note.
topBar.quickHelpDescription: Common paths to get value faster.
topBar.helpTransactions: Add entries quickly from Transactions, then review trends in Analytics.
topBar.helpSettings: Use Settings -> Export CSV for backup, and Apple Shortcuts for fast mobile capture.
topBar.profileDescription: Review your account details, update display name, and change password.
topBar.passwordFieldsRequired: Enter both current password and new password.
topBar.passwordMinLengthError: New password must be at least 8 characters.

firstLogin.title: Getting Started
firstLogin.description: Build your setup in 2 steps: create an account first, then add your first transaction to unlock dashboard and analytics.
firstLogin.tip: Tip: if email verification is unavailable in local dev, use password registration/login or Google sign-in.
firstLogin.accountStepDescription: Add cash, bank, or card balances so reports have a real starting point.
firstLogin.transactionStepDescription: Use one income or expense to unlock the dashboard, review queue, and analytics.

smartViews.title: Smart Views
smartViews.description: Open focused cleanup queues for missing categories, duplicates, and unusually large expenses.

empty.initial: Start by creating your first transaction, or jump to Quick Entry on mobile workflows.

importDialog.title: Import Ledger Data
importDialog.description: Upload your financial statements to synchronize your ledger.
importDialog.dropTitle: Click to upload or drag and drop
importDialog.dedupeHint: Duplicate transactions are skipped during import confirmation using transaction date, amount, type, and memo/category signals.
importDialog.mappingDescription: Map each CSV column before importing. Defaults are remembered for the next import.
importDialog.mappedPreviewDescription: Review the first rows exactly as they will be submitted.
importDialog.missingRequiredMapping: Map date, amount, and memo columns before confirming this import.
importDialog.resultsDescription: Review what was imported, skipped, or failed before closing.
importDialog.noProblems: No skipped or failed rows were found.

addDialog.title: Add New Transaction
addDialog.description: Record the amount first. Account and ledger are filled in when possible.
addDialog.amountHelper: Required. Use a positive amount; the transaction type controls income or expense.
addDialog.categoryHelper: Common categories appear first. You can leave this blank and review it later.

bulk.description: Apply repetitive clean-up actions without opening each transaction.
bulk.partialUpdated: {{updated}} updated, {{failed}} failed. Failed rows stay selected.
bulk.partialDeleted: {{deleted}} deleted, {{failed}} failed. Failed rows stay selected.

accountsPage.title: Accounts
accountsPage.description: Manage connected balance sources, ledgers, categories, and operational tags from one place.
accountsPage.noAccounts: No accounts yet. Create your first account to start tracking balances.
accountsPage.noLedgers: No ledgers yet. Create one to organize reporting by scenario.
accountsPage.categoryHelper: Common defaults are shown first. Search only when you need to audit or edit the full catalog.

dialogs.createAccountDescription: Add a new balance source for transactions and reporting.
dialogs.createLedgerDescription: Add a ledger for organizing balances and transactions.

analyticsPage.title: Analytics
analyticsPage.description: Comparative insight across category concentration and cashflow rhythm.
analyticsPage.categoryShare: Ranked by share of selected period expense.
analyticsPage.spendingCloudHint: Memo and category keywords are weighted by spending amount.
analyticsPage.noCloudData: No spending themes for selected range.
analyticsPage.noCategoryData: No category data for selected range.
analyticsPage.categoryEmptyHint: Create a few expense transactions to unlock category concentration insights.
analyticsPage.noSelectedTransactions: No transactions recorded for this period.
analyticsPage.noTrendData: No trend data for selected range.
analyticsPage.trendEmptyHint: Once you record income or expense entries, trend bars will appear here automatically.

insights.title: Insight Summary
insights.description: Plain-language cues explain what changed before users dive into charts.
insights.topKeyword: {{keyword}} is the strongest spending theme at {{amount}} across {{count}} transactions.
insights.savingsRate: Savings rate for this period is {{rate}}.
insights.noIncome: No income is recorded in this period, so savings rate is not available.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.description: Issue PATs for automation, revoke compromised access, and export your financial archive as CSV.
settingsPage.patWarning: Use PAT only for automation tools (Shortcuts, scripts, CI jobs). Never share in chat or screenshots.
settingsPage.noPatHint: Create one when you connect external automation, then revoke it immediately after the task is done.
settingsPage.secretHint: Store this token securely after creation. It is displayed once and cannot be fetched again.

shortcutPage.title: Apple Shortcuts
shortcutPage.description: Create a scoped token and endpoint for fast mobile expense capture with Apple Shortcuts.
shortcutPage.step1Description: Generate a shortcut token and endpoint. New shortcut tokens expire after 90 days.
shortcutPage.step2Description: Tap the button below to download the shortcut. Once it opens, paste your URL and Token when prompted.

manualSteps.openShortcuts: Open the Shortcuts app on your iPhone.
manualSteps.createShortcut: Tap + in the top right to create a shortcut.
manualSteps.addAction: Add the Get Contents of URL action.
manualSteps.pasteEndpoint: Paste the copied API Endpoint above.
manualSteps.setPost: Expand the action and set Method to POST.
manualSteps.addAuthorization: Add an Authorization header with value Bearer your-token.
manualSteps.setJson: Set Request Body to JSON and enter your transaction data, such as amount, type, and category.

shortcutPage.securityDescription: Shortcut tokens should be short-lived and purpose-specific. Revoke any token you no longer use from Settings.

pwa.installDescription: Install Xledger on your home screen for quick access
pwa.step1: Tap the share button at the bottom of Safari
pwa.step2: Scroll down and find "Add to Home Screen"
pwa.step3: Tap "Add" in the top right corner

errors.networkError: Network error, please check your connection
errors.serverError: Server error, please try again later
errors.unauthorized: Not logged in or session expired
